# Moore Roofing & Designs Inc.
> Licensed roofing contractor serving Northeast Florida. Roof replacement, repair, inspection, and storm damage. CCC License #1334514.

## Business
- Name: Moore Roofing & Designs Inc.
- Type: RoofingContractor
- Phone: (904) 376-5712
- Address: 752 Blanding Blvd Suite 100, Orange Park, FL 32065
- Area Served: Orange Park, Jacksonville, and Northeast Florida
- Website: https://yourwebsiteexample.com/mooreroofing/

## Services
- Roof Replacement
- Roof Repair
- Roof Inspection
- Storm Damage Repair
- Shingle Roofing
- Gutter Installation

## Frequently Asked Questions
**How much does a new roof cost in Florida?**
In Northeast Florida, roof replacement typically ranges from $8,000 to $20,000 depending on home size, pitch, and roofing material. Architectural shingles are the most common choice in our area. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates.

**How long does roof replacement take?**
Most residential roof replacements in Orange Park and Jacksonville are completed in 1 to 2 days. Larger or more complex roofs may take 3 days. We work to minimize disruption to your household.

**Do you handle insurance claims for storm damage?**
Yes. We work with homeowners through the entire insurance claim process for wind, hail, and storm damage. We document damage thoroughly and can communicate directly with your adjuster.

**Is Moore Roofing a licensed contractor?**
Yes. Moore Roofing & Designs Inc. holds Florida CCC License #1334514. We are fully licensed, bonded, and insured for all roofing work in Florida.

**What areas in Northeast Florida do you serve?**
We serve Orange Park, Jacksonville, Fleming Island, Middleburg, Green Cove Springs, Fernandina Beach, and surrounding Northeast Florida communities.
